name: Focaccia-Vegetarian
recipeIngredient: Frozen bread OR Recipe for Focaccia Dough
Egg white or egg substitute (1 each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the ricotta cheese.
2. Roll the dough into a 12x9 rectangle.
3. Spread spinach over the dough.
4. Add ricotta cheese.
5. Add sliced mushrooms.
6. Sprinkle mozzerella cheese on top.
7. Roll up the dough tightly.
8. Seal the edges with egg white or egg substitute.
9. Form the rolled dough into a circle and seal the ends with egg white or egg substitute.
10. Brush the top of the pizza with egg.
11. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 40 minutes.
